title: BEM-993 runtime validator
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_live_runtime_receipt.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

FORBIDDEN_KEYS = {"openai_api_key", "api_key", "token", "secret", "pat", "raw_credentials"}
FORBIDDEN_ACTIONS = {"codex_cli", "paid_api_without_operator_gate", "secret_value_write"}
REQUIRED_KEYS = {"trace_id", "timestamp_utc3", "logical_role", "provider_id", "provider_mode", "runtime_ref", "approval_ref", "execution_receipt_ref", "audit_ref", "paid_api_used"}


def validate_receipt(payload):
    errors = []
    missing = sorted(REQUIRED_KEYS - set(payload.keys()))
    if missing:
        errors.append({"code": "missing_required_fields", "fields": missing})
    forbidden = sorted(k for k in payload.keys() if k.lower() in FORBIDDEN_KEYS)
    if forbidden:
        errors.append({"code": "forbidden_secret_fields", "fields": forbidden})
    actions = set(payload.get("actions", []))
    forbidden_actions = sorted(actions & FORBIDDEN_ACTIONS)
    if forbidden_actions:
        errors.append({"code": "forbidden_actions", "actions": forbidden_actions})
    if payload.get("paid_api_used") is not False:
        errors.append({"code": "paid_api_used_not_false", "actual": payload.get("paid_api_used")})
    return {"ok": not errors, "errors": errors}


def main():
    sample_path = Path("governance/tests/fixtures/live_runtime_receipt_sample.json")
    if not sample_path.exists():
        result = {"ok": False, "errors": [{"code": "sample_missing", "path": str(sample_path)}]}
    else:
        result = validate_receipt(json.loads(sample_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")))
    out = Path("governance/reports/BEM993_LIVE_RUNTIME_RECEIPT_VALIDATOR_RESULT.json")
    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    out.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    return 0 if result["ok"] else 1


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
